'''Tiarri''' was one of the [[Marriage/Legends|wives]] of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Sha-Mar Ma-dred]], the ruler of [[Kashir]]. Before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|clone wars]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and his master [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] were sent to a meeting with Sha-Mar Ma-dred. As the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] approached the king, Tiarri and the other wives ([[Kheann]], [[Mirrix]] and [[Ashala Ma-dred|Ashala]]) were present but were sent away after being introduced to do as they wished. Tiarri was in bed that night when she saw a Skywalker intrude in their room and alarmed the other wives Kheann and Mirrix who tackled him. Skywalker told them that someone stole [[Anakin Skywalker's first lightsaber/Legends|his lightsaber]]. Tiarri complimented Skywalkerfor his looks and told him that Ashala took his lightsaber. Before Skywalker left, Tiarra tried to warn him to "watch out for" before being interrupted by Mirrix and Kheann.<ref name="AJM" />
